message:
bd-37a.6: Effect system observability with Cx-aware execution helpers

New effect_system module providing observability and Cx-aware execution
infrastructure for the Command/Subscription effect system:

- TRACING: span 'effect.command' with command_type, duration_us, result
  fields; span 'effect.subscription' with sub_type, event_count, active
- LOG: DEBUG for effect lifecycle (start/complete), WARN for timeout,
  ERROR for panic
- METRICS: counters effects_command_total, effects_subscription_total,
  effects_executed_total; histogram effect_duration_us via tracing field
- Integration: Cmd::Task in program.rs records command effects,
  SubscriptionManager in subscription.rs records start/stop events
- Public API: trace_command_effect(), record_command_effect(),
  record_subscription_start/stop(), warn/error helpers
- 11 inline tests covering spans, events, counters, WARN/ERROR logs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
